HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
William T. McNulty, appeared for Plaintiff/Moving party
Tiffany Vallier, Defendant, appeared In Propria persona

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2001 Sweep; Adjudicated
